What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a light beige shirt and gold necklace stands on a gravel court. Metallic boules and a small green jack rest near a white painted line on the ground. Text overlays identify the event as Mondial La Marseillaise 2004. Spectators watch from behind a metal barrier in the background. The Zone Pétanque logo appears in the top-left corner.
